name: AI Web Research Agent
description: Takes a research question, uses Exa to search the web for relevant sources, Firecrawl to scrape the most promising pages, and Claude AI to synthesize findings into a structured research report with citations. Posts the report to Slack using Block Kit formatting.

source.originalName: AI agent that can scrape webpages

question.description: Research question to investigate (e.g. 'What are the latest advances in quantum computing error correction?')

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the research report

steps.name: Search the web for relevant sources via Exa
Compile all research data for Claude analysis
Strip code fences and parse Claude JSON output
Build Slack Block Kit research report
